description: Score a candidate against multiple opportunities and produce a ranked fit matrix with strengths and gaps
usage: am I a good fit for, does my resume match, qualify for roles, appropriate for jobs, career fit, suitable for positions, careers align with my background, right for these roles

candidate.description: The candidate to evaluate — references a workspace file (e.g., 'resume' maps to extract_resume.json)

opportunities.description: The set of opportunities to match against — references a workspace file (e.g., 'anthropic' maps to jobs_anthropic.json)
